revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23168229401|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_Source here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{Ambox | name = {{{name|Unreferenced}}} | subst = {{subst:substcheck}} | type = content | class = ambox-Unreferenced | small = {{{small|}}} | image = [[File:Question book-new.svg|50x40px|alt=]] | issue = This {{{1|article}}} '''does not [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|cite]] any [[Wikipedia:Verifiability|sources]]'''. | fix = Please help [[Special:EditPage/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|improve this {{{1|article}}}]] by [[Help:Referencing for beginners|adding citations to reliable sources]]. Unsourced material may be challenged and [[Wikipedia:Verifiability#Burden of evidence|removed]].{{#if:{{{find2|{{{unquoted|}}}}}}|
{{find sources mainspace|{{#if:{{{find|}}}|{{{find}}}|.}}|{{{find2|{{{unquoted|}}}}}}}} |{{#if:{{{find|}}}|{{#ifeq: {{{find|}}} |none ||
{{find sources mainspace|{{{find}}} }}}}|
{{find sources mainspace}}}}}} | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles {{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|section|needing additional references|lacking sources}} | all = All articles {{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|section|needing additional references|lacking sources}} | all2 = {{#ifeq:{{{status}}}|hasaref|All articles possibly lacking sources}} }} }} {{documentation}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
